templates.name: Do you offer exchanges?
templates.content: If you would like to exchange your online purchase, please return the item(s) you wish to exchange and place a new order on our site.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.cos.com/en-us/customer-service/returns

templates.name: How do I get replacement returns note/label?
templates.content: If you need a replacement returns note, you can find it here: https://a.storyblok.com/f/251958/x/239607ddfe/cos_return_form_us.pdf If you are missing the self-adhesive return label from your parcel, please contact customer service at +1 855 842 1818, Monday - Sunday, 9am - 9pm EST.

templates.name: Checkout error: RM1
templates.content:
I'm sorry to hear that! Please note that this error is a payment decline error that is typically resolved by checking the billing address and/or switching browsers. Can you please review your billing address and try using a different browser? 

If you still experience issues please contact us via the live chat feature on our website: https://www.cos.com/en_usd/customer-service/contact-info.html or give us a call at +1 855 842 1818. Our team will be more than happy to assist you with this.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 business day and once shipped it will take 5-8 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: How do I return my order?
templates.content: On the returns note, fill in the return code for the garment you are returning and include this in the package. Re-using the original packaging, tape the parcel securely and attach the pre-paid label included in your parcel. Attach the pre-paid UPS label and parcel over the prior delivery information. Using the label provided will guarantee a refund in the event of loss during delivery to our warehouse. Then simply drop off your package at a UPS Drop Box or the UPS Store.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via the live chat feature on our website: https://www.cos.com/en_usd/customer-service/contact-info.html or give us a call at +1 855 842 1818, Monday - Sunday, 9am - 9pm EST. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via the live chat feature on our website: https://www.cos.com/en_usd/customer-service/contact-info.html or give us a call at +1 855 842 1818, Monday - Sunday, 9am - 9pm EST. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How should I care for my garment?
templates.content: How you should care for your products depends on the material they are made from. We have detailed guides for different wools and knits, cotton, silk, linen and leather here: https://www.cos.com/en_usd/product-care.html

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us near you here: https://www.cos.com/en_usd/store-locator.html

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Do you ship to PO Boxes?
templates.content: We do ship to P.O. Boxes.

templates.name: Do you offer express/expedited shipping?
templates.content: We offer express shipping. Orders placed by 12pm EST Monday to Friday will ship out same day and be delivered within 1-2 business days. Orders placed after 12pm EST will be shipped out next business day and delivered within 1-2 business days. Orders placed after 4pm EST on Friday will be delivered on Tuesday at the earliest. Please note, we don't offer express shipping service to Alaska and Hawaii at this time.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at +1 855 842 1818, Monday - Sunday, 9am - 9pm EST or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Do you ship to APO/FPO addresses?
templates.content: I'm afraid we are unable to ship APO/FPO/DPO addresses or US Territories at this time.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! As many pieces are designed in a unique way, we suggest you refer to the specific garment lengths and measurements provided in the product descriptions. If you're still unsure, please let me know!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/cosstores/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/cos/

templates.name: Can I return my online order in store?
templates.content: You can return item(s) purchased online to our stores free of charge in the United States. To return your item(s), simply bring your email order confirmation or the packing slip and the piece(s) you wish to return to your local store. You can find us near you here: https://www.cos.com/en_usd/store-locator.html

templates.name: Do you offer student discount?
templates.content: You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.cos.com/en_usd/customer-service/student-discount.html

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via the live chat feature on our website: https://www.cos.com/en_usd/customer-service/contact-info.html or give us a call at +1 855 842 1818, Monday - Sunday, 9am - 9pm EST. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How long does it take to process my return?
templates.content: Please allow 7 business days from the time we receive your return for it to be processed. We always try to be as fast as possible, but during busy periods (such as holidays and sales), it can take a little longer. Once we have processed the return, you will receive a return confirmation email.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via the live chat feature on our website: https://www.cos.com/en_usd/customer-service/contact-info.html or give us a call at +1 855 842 1818, Monday - Sunday, 9am - 9pm EST. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $150. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.cos.com/en-us/customer-service/delivery/locate-your-order

templates.name: Can I use my gift card for online orders?
templates.content: Cards are redeemable only for purchases of goods or services at COS retail locations in the United States and Puerto Rico. Cards are not redeemable online.

templates.name: Do you offer plus sizes?
templates.content: I'm afraid not. We offer the following size ranges, XXS - XL for womenswear and XS - XXL for menswear. We recommend you use the sort/filter options to view products closer to your size range if it is above these.
